$comment: Index of all JSON Schemas in the phil ecosystem.

schemas.name: Concept
schemas.description: A philosophical concept with multilingual labels and tradition metadata.

schemas.name: ConceptSpans
schemas.description: GRanges-like concept annotations on philosophical texts.

schemas.name: PhilCorpus
schemas.description: SummarizedExperiment-like data container for philosophical texts.

schemas.name: Argument
schemas.description: A philosophical argument with premises, conclusion, and inference type.
